channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nurses Urge Probe Into Hospital Director's Handling Of Social Media Disciplinary Case
item.description: The Elegant Nurses Forum (ENF) has condemned the disciplinary action taken against a nurse at Kaduna Federal Neuro-Psychiatric Hospital over social media comments, calling it an abuse of power and vio...

item.title: PCSO Lotto Results: One Winner Claims Over P20M Megalotto Jackpot on July 24, 2026
item.description: The Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) announced on July 24, 2026, that there was one winner of the over P20 million Megalotto 6/45 jackpot draw. The winning combination of 14-20-19-31-02-11...

item.title: Vice President Nchimbi emphasizes justice as foundation for peace and national unity
item.description: Vice President Emmanuel Nchimbi has emphasized that justice is essential for achieving lasting peace and national unity in Tanzania. Speaking at the Tanzania Human Rights Defenders Coalition (THRDC) G...

item.title: Meghan Markle's family visits Princess Diana's childhood home during summer holidays
item.description: Meghan Markle has shared photographs of her family's summer holiday activities, including a visit to the childhood home of Princess Diana. The Duchess of Sussex, along with Prince Harry and their chil...

item.title: Defense Secretary Hegseth faces impeachment over war powers allegations
item.description: U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth is under investigation for potential impeachment over allegations of violating the War Powers Resolution. Rep. Thomas Massie (R-KY) intensified the case by citin...

item.title: Manitoba's Weekend Events: July 24-26 Highlights
item.description: The article compiles a list of events and news stories happening across Manitoba during the weekend of July 24-26, 2026. Key highlights include cultural and recreational activities, such as music fest...

item.title: Report says Trump administration is preparing census rule changes that could affect immigrant population counts and congressional representation

item.title: James Reid's Journey from PBB to Teleserye Stardom

item.title: India says MV Golden Leo was carrying grain, reiterates condemnation of attack that killed four Indian seafarers
item.description: The Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) has rejected Russia's assertion that the merchant vessel MV Golden Leo, which was struck in a missile attack near Ukraine's Odesa port, was transporting military...

item.description: Jurgen Klopp has been appointed as the new manager of the German national football team, marking a significant shift in the country's approach to international competition. The decision comes after Ge...

item.description: The United States has launched missile strikes across multiple locations in Iran, including its Caspian coast, following President Donald Trump's vow of 'major military punishment' against Tehran and ...

item.title: Studio Portraits Capture Lynda Carter at the Beginning of Her Wonder Woman Breakthrough in 1975
item.description: Vintage Everyday published a collection of 30 studio portraits showcasing actress Lynda Carter during 1975, a pivotal year in her career. At 24 years old, Carter was on the verge of becoming internati...

item.title: Ekurhuleni Municipality Addresses Sewer Blockages in Villa Liza

item.description: The article discusses recent fluctuations in Google's stock price and their potential impact on investors. Analysts highlight concerns about the company's advertising revenue growth, which has slowed ...

item.title: Local Governments Strengthen Maritime Sovereignty in West Philippine Sea Through Governance Initiatives

item.title: Top Fruits for Enhancing Brain Health and Cognitive Function
item.description: This article explores the nutritional benefits of five fruits linked to improved brain health, based on expert research. Blueberries, rich in anthocyanins, may enhance memory and blood flow. Citrus fr...

item.title: GLP-1 Medications and the Risk of Yo-Yo Dieting Cycles
item.description: The article discusses the potential for weight-loss medications like Wegovy and Mounjaro to create a new cycle of yo-yo dieting. While these drugs, which mimic hormones to reduce appetite and increase...

item.title: Trump's Frustration Over Prolonged Iran Conflict
item.description: President Donald Trump reportedly unleashed a profanity-laden temper tantrum in the Oval Office over his failure to end the Iran war, according to an inside source. The incident, detailed in a Wall St...
